_comment: Daily Dash config — edit by hand or re-run /daily-dash to update. Tools you don't use stay disabled; Slack channels and Notion DB URL can be appended over time.

user._comment: timezone is an IANA name (e.g. America/Toronto, Europe/London). Default written at setup from `date +%Z`.

vault._comment: scan_parent = let Claude Code also read sibling folders (notes/, work-items/, etc.) for additional context during refresh.

mode._comment: kind: 'file' = open dashboard.html directly (view-only). 'localhost' = run serve-dashboard.py so card-level comments sync back to Claude Code on the next /daily-dash.

slack._comment: Channels to monitor for mentions and threads where you're awaited. Append channel names like '#growth-pod' as needed.

calendar._comment: Google Calendar via MCP. Pulls today, tomorrow, and rest-of-week events. Deleted events are cleared on each refresh.

notion._comment: tickets_db_url = the URL of your operating-system or work-tracking database. scan_notifications = pull the notification feed for mentions across pages outside your DB.

gmail._comment: Pulls direct threads from the last 24h needing a response. Renders as its own card on Today.

granola._comment: Granola meeting transcripts. Pulled and attached to calendar events as summaries. Use this OR notion_meeting_notes — not both.

notion_meeting_notes._comment: Alternative to Granola. Point to the Notion parent page where you save meeting notes/summaries.

q2._comment: Optional. One sentence describing your quarter goal. Renders at the top of the Q2 tab. Leave blank for a placeholder.

learning._comment: Smart-layer toggles. Each learner reads from and writes to dear-me/memory/context.md. Disable any block to revert that surface to static behavior.
